basic_details.job_title: JIPMER – Project Technical Support, Project Nurse – 3 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Recruitment 2026 for 3 posts of Project Technical Support III / Project Nurse-III / Project Technical Support-II. Candidates with M.Sc, B.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through JIPMER official website jipmer.edu.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in clinical psychology / psychology/ Rehabilitation Psychology, Bachelor's degree in nursing from an Institute recognized by the Nursing Council of India, Three-year graduate degree from a recognized university

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Technical Support, Project Nurse Posts
